sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89400" key="prosqafaire/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσθαφαιρ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n89400.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">add or subtract as required</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
